results.title: Google Adding More Link Cards To AI Responses
results.description: Google may be adding more link cards to the sidebar of the Google AI responses. Specifically, Google AI Mode and AI Overviews are testing showing more citation/link cards on the side of the AI response.

results.title: Hakusan to Invest Approximately JPY 5 Billion in New Ishikawa Plant to Support Growing AI Data Center Demand
results.description: KANAZAWA, Japan, June 3, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Hakusan Inc., a global leader in optical connector components and a member of the Lightera Group, today announced plans to invest approximately JPY 5 billion to construct a new manufacturing facility in Kahoku City, Ishikawa Prefecture, Japan....

results.title: Samsung’s flagship foldable confirmed to get an ‘Ultra’ name change
results.description: New certification listings have confirmed that Samsung will use the Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra moniker for its upcoming foldable phone.

results.title: Early Amazon Prime Day deals now live: AirPods Pro 3, Pixel 10, Ring smart home up to 50% off, more
results.description: Amazon 50% off Ring smart home bundles, AirPods Pro 3, and Google gear, plus more. more...
